title: Smoky Rose Petal Stir Fry
description: A delicate and savory stir fry dish featuring the subtle flavors of smoky chicken and rose petals.
instructions: Heat the smoky olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the rose petals and snow peas to the skillet and cook until the peas are tender, about 2-3 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir in the smoked paprika and stir-fry sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
